summary: This topic explains how to establish the daily schedule for a class by defining lecture numbers, their start and end times, and incorporating breaks.
steps: Navigate to the 'Academics' section via the 'Settings' icon.
Select the 'Class' for which the timetable is being created.
For 'Lecture Number 1', enter the 'Start Time' (e.g., 8:00 AM) and 'End Time' (e.g., 8:45 AM).
Click 'Add More Lectures' to define subsequent lecture slots. The 'Start Time' for the next lecture will automatically default to the 'End Time' of the previous one.
To define a 'Break' period, specify the lecture number, start time, and end time, then toggle the 'Break' option on.
business_rules: The start time of a new lecture automatically populates with the end time of the preceding lecture.
All daily timings, including lectures and breaks, must be defined in the schedule.
important_notes: This step only defines the time slots; subjects and teachers are assigned in a subsequent step.
questions: How do I create a new timetable schedule for a class?
How do I define the start and end times for lectures?
Can I include breaks in the timetable schedule?
Does the system automatically calculate the start time for the next lecture?
How many lectures can I add to a schedule?
related_topics: Assigning Subjects and Teachers to Timetable Slots
